summary: Replace packed 24-bit cable ring with INT32 frame-indexed ring; hard-reject overflow + counters.

steps.name: cross-tu-frame-pipe-access-removal
steps.summary: Removed cross-TU FRAME_PIPE field access before struct rewrite.

steps.name: frame-pipe-struct-api-rewrite
steps.summary: FRAME_PIPE struct shape replaced with canonical INT32 ring API and compile-preserving shim.

steps.name: ring-write-int32-conversion
steps.summary: Same-rate INT32 ring write + 4-way bit-depth dispatch.

steps.name: ring-read-int32-conversion
steps.summary: Same-rate INT32 ring read + hysteretic underrun.

steps.name: hard-reject-overflow
steps.summary: Audit complete; only AoRingWriteFromScratch writes the cable ring.
